title: Prompt chaining: trade latency for accuracy

body.goal: Break a complex task into a sequence of simpler LLM calls, each building on the last, with optional quality gates between steps.
steps: Decompose the task into fixed, sequential subtasks (e.g., 'generate outline' → 'check outline' → 'write document')
Each LLM call takes the output of the previous step as input
Add programmatic 'gate' checks between steps to verify the process is on track (e.g., does the outline meet criteria?)
If a gate fails, you can retry that step or abort early — saving cost on doomed chains
